response:
<<Digital Ethics Guide>>
Section 1
Microsoft values trust in tech.
Tech needs clear rules.
Rules protect user data.
Data privacy is key.
Key parts need care.
Care guides our path.
Path leads to safety.
Safety builds strong bonds.
Bonds connect people well.
Well built systems last.
Section 2
AI must act fair.
Fair code helps all.
All users need help.
Help comes from care.
Care stops bad bias.
Bias hurts many folks.
Folks deserve equal rights.
Rights are not gifts.
Gifts can be taken.
Taken rights cause pain.
Section 3
Policies guide our work.
Work requires honest steps.
Steps must be clear.
Clear plans avoid harm.
Harm breaks user trust.
Trust is hard won.
Won trust needs care.
Care means open books.
Books show our plans.
Plans include safety checks.
Section 4
Checks stop wrong acts.
Acts that hurt people.
People need safe tools.
Tools should serve well.
Well designed AI works.
Works that fail hurt.
Hurt users leave fast.
Fast loss costs much.
Much money buys trust.
Trust takes years to grow.
Section 5
Growth needs steady steps.
Steps follow ethical laws.
Laws change over time.
Time brings new risks.
Risks need new plans.
Plans adapt to change.
Change requires open minds.
Minds that seek truth.
Truth guides our choices.
Choices shape the future.
Section 6
Future holds great hope.
Hope needs strong guard.
Guard protects young kids.
Kids need safe play.
Play must be clean.
Clean fun builds joy.
Joy comes from trust.
Trust makes life better.
Better lives need care.
Care is our promise.
Section 7
Promise stands for good.
Good acts build peace.
Peace allows free growth.
Growth helps global folks.
Folks share ideas freely.
Freely shared ideas spark.
Spark lights new paths.
Paths lead to success.
Success means shared wins.
Wins belong to all.
Section 8
All voices matter most.
Most voices shape policy.
Policy guides future work.
Work creates better tools.
Tools serve human needs.
Needs drive our focus.
Focus
